statement: The function checks if the window is not empty (a < b) before proceeding.
The function checks if the new window overlaps with any existing windows in the timeline.
If the start of the window is greater than or equal to the end, a ValueError is raised for an empty window.

condition: any((not (b <= s or a >= e) for s, e in timeline))
statement: If there is an overlap between the new window and any existing window in the timeline, the function returns False without updating the timeline.
The function returns True along with the updated timeline after successfully adding the new window.
